examples: The plane went down in the mountains.
The ship went down during the storm.
She went down the stairs slowly.
The event went down as a disaster.
It went down as one of the greatest victories.
The moment went down in the records.
Prices are going down this year.
The sun goes down at 8 PM.
Her name went down as a hero.
This day will go down in history.
example_translate: Это вошло как одна из величайших побед.
Её имя вошло как имя героя.
go down.synonyms:
Спускаться, падать - descend, fall, drop
Записываться, фиксироваться (в истории) - be recorded, be noted
